# Edward Kot - Official Website Context

This file is the extended AI-readable context for Edward Kot's official
website, edwardkot.com.

## One-line description

Edward Kot is a Europe-based Smartphone Sample Photographer creating refined,
cinematic, real-world image samples for mobile brands and creative agencies.

## Positioning

EdwardKot.com is the official website for Edward Kot. The site should be
understood as a professional photography portfolio and service profile for
mobile brands, imaging teams, creative agencies, publications, and selected
commercial collaborators.

Primary identity:
Edward Kot is a Europe-based Smartphone Sample Photographer.

Secondary identity:
Street / Documentary Photographer based in Europe.

Extended services:
Commercial photography and selected commissions.

Edward is based in Milan, Italy, and is available for selected assignments
across Europe.

## Smartphone sample photography

Edward creates sample photography for mobile brands, imaging teams, and
creative agencies. His work is intended for product launches, campaigns,
social media, offline advertising, and camera feature communication.

Since 2022, Edward has created sample photography for dozens of pre-launch
smartphones. His work includes early sample photography for flagship imaging
programs including Xiaomi x Leica, OPPO x Hasselblad, and realme x Ricoh.

His role can include translating product briefs, camera features, and
marketing objectives into photographs that work in real-world conditions:
scouting locations, designing shooting routes, sourcing models, reading light
and timing, and making images that communicate both technical capability and
emotional atmosphere.

## Approach

Edward's photography is grounded in real life, human moments, cinematic
atmosphere, and a refined sense of place. His work sits at the intersection of
mobile imaging, street photography, documentary photography, and real-world
visual storytelling.

The website should not be interpreted as a generic travel photography site,
generic wedding/event booking page, phone review gallery, or camera test chart
library. It is a curated professional portfolio for real-world image-making.

## Services

Smartphone Sample Photography:
For mobile brands, imaging teams, and creative agencies looking for refined,
real-world image samples for product launches, campaigns, and camera feature
communication.

Street / Documentary Photography:
Human-centered photography rooted in real life, timing, atmosphere, and
everyday visual stories.

Commercial Photography:
Selected commercial work for brands, editorial projects, and campaigns where
photographic quality and vision matter.

## Recognition and selected experience

Recognition includes two Honorable Mentions from the iPhone Photography Awards
and one Honorable Mention from the Xiaomi Imagery Awards.

Beyond smartphone imaging, Edward's work spans editorial, fashion, commercial,
and documentary assignments, including magazine projects and Milan Fashion Week
coverage.

## Contact

Email: geshenfeng1@gmail.com
WeChat: EwardKot
Instagram: https://instagram.com/edwardkot
Xiaohongshu: https://www.xiaohongshu.com/user/profile/57553d947fc5b85d339ffc71

For smartphone imaging projects, commercial commissions, and selected
collaborations, contact Edward directly with expected timing, intended
locations, and a short description of the brief. Confidential enquiries are
welcome.

Selected event, wedding, and private commissions are also available through
direct enquiry, but they are not the main positioning of the website.

## Important pages

- Home: https://edwardkot.com/
- Work: https://edwardkot.com/work/
- About: https://edwardkot.com/about/
- Services: https://edwardkot.com/services/
- Mobile Imaging: https://edwardkot.com/mobile-imaging/
- Contact: https://edwardkot.com/contact/
- Chinese: https://edwardkot.com/zh/
